hero.desc: If your hair is thinning, you may feel older overnight. With FUE hair transplant in Kuala Lumpur, you can rebuild a natural look, step by step.

trust.t1Desc: Two decades of confidential, professional care
trust.t2Desc: Wisma UOA II, Jalan Pinang - In the heart of KL
trust.t3Desc: FUE transplants & comprehensive hair loss treatments

quickAnswers.a1: It removes follicular units one by one using tiny punches, then places them in thinning areas.
quickAnswers.a2: Local anaesthesia is used. You may feel pressure, then mild soreness later.
quickAnswers.a3: Most visible change builds over months. Full results around 9 to 12 months or longer.
quickAnswers.a4: FUE usually leaves many very tiny scars, not a long strip scar.

whyFUE.title: Why FUE is the most searched hair transplant option in Malaysia
whyFUE.desc: People in Kuala Lumpur want results that look normal in real life. Not just in before and after photos.
whyFUE.b1: No long strip scar on the back of the head
whyFUE.b3: Perfect for hairline work and detail areas like temples
whyFUE.cardP1: FUE stands for follicular unit excision. Your surgeon removes tiny natural hair groupings, usually 1 to 4 hairs.
whyFUE.cardP2: These grafts come from the donor area at the back of the scalp. That area usually keeps hair thicker for longer.

journey.desc: Every clinic has its own workflow, but FUE usually follows the same core stages
journey.s1Desc: Your doctor checks your hair loss pattern and donor density. You discuss your styling habits and daily routine.
journey.s2Desc: A good hairline matches your face and age. This is where natural results begin.
journey.s3Desc: The donor area is trimmed. Local anaesthesia is used for comfort.
journey.s4Desc: Grafts are removed one by one using micro punches, then placed to follow natural direction.

recovery.r1Desc: Tight, sore scalp is common. Swelling can happen.
recovery.r2Desc: Scabbing forms, then starts to fall. You must avoid picking.
recovery.r3Desc: Shedding can happen. This can look scary, but it is often part of the cycle.
recovery.r4Desc: New growth starts to show. It may look fine at first, then thickens.
recovery.r5Desc: Most people see their main result in this window.

comparison.fueFeature: Many very tiny scars, usually hard to notice
comparison.futDesc: A strip is removed, then grafts are separated
comparison.futFeature: Can leave a single larger scar
comparison.dhiFeature: Still needs proper extraction and planning
comparison.note: In real life, the "best" option is the one that fits your scalp, donor, and goals.

cost.desc: FUE hair transplant cost in Kuala Lumpur and Malaysia
cost.adviceDesc: Do not compare price without comparing what is included. Ask about doctor involvement, graft handling, and follow-up support.

peopleAsk.q8: How many grafts do I need for my hairline?
peopleAsk.q10: Can an FUE hair transplant fail?
peopleAsk.q11: Is Malaysia a good place for FUE hair transplant?
peopleAsk.q12: What should I avoid after FUE?

approach.desc: At Nexus Clinic Kuala Lumpur, the goal should be simple. Make the plan feel safe, private, and realistic.
approach.a3: A downtime plan that fits your work life
approach.a4: A maintenance plan for existing hair

cta.desc: If you want a natural hairline, start with a calm consult. Ask for a plan that matches your face, hair type, and future loss pattern.
cta.address: Wisma UOA II, Jalan Pinang, Kuala Lumpur
